## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows no-comments no-emojis style
- [ ] `dotnet format --verify-no-changes` passes
- [ ] `dotnet test` passes locally
- [ ] New tweak includes JSON definition, Apply, Revert, unit test
- [ ] Tooltip metadata filled in (description, modifies, risk, impact, source)
- [ ] README or CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
